courses.title: UI/UX Design Complete Course
courses.description: Learn user interface and user experience design from basics to advanced. Master Figma, design systems, prototyping, and user research.

courses.title: Mobile App Development with React Native
courses.description: Build native mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native. Learn navigation, state management, APIs, and publish your apps to app stores.
